code: import api from'./api';class LessonService{async getLessonContent(topicId){const response=await api.get("/lessons/topic/".concat(topicId));return response.data;}async updateProgress(progressUpdate){const response=await api.post('/lessons/progress/update',progressUpdate);return response.data;}async getNextTopic(topicId){const response=await api.get("/lessons/topic/".concat(topicId,"/next"));return response.data;}async getPreviousTopic(topicId){const response=await api.get("/lessons/topic/".concat(topicId,"/previous"));return response.data;}}export default new LessonService();
